import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
path=Path('desktop/fashion_ecommerce/product_data/top10_product_status_table.xlsx')
ns={'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main','r':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships','pr':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships'}
with zipfile.ZipFile(path) as z:
    shared=[]
    if 'xl/sharedStrings.xml' in z.namelist():
        root=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/sharedStrings.xml'))
        for si in root.findall('a:si', ns):
            texts=[]
            for t in si.iterfind('.//a:t', ns):
                texts.append(t.text or '')
            shared.append(''.join(texts))
    wb=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/workbook.xml'))
    rels=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/_rels/workbook.xml.rels'))
    rel_map={rel.attrib['Id']: rel.attrib['Target'] for rel in rels.findall('pr:Relationship', ns)}
    sheets=[]
    for sh in wb.find('a:sheets', ns):
        sheets.append((sh.attrib['name'], rel_map[sh.attrib['{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships}id']]))
    print('SHEETS', sheets)
    for name,target in sheets:
        xml=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/'+target))
        print('SHEET', name)
        rows=xml.find('a:sheetData', ns)
        for row in list(rows)[:8]:
            vals=[]
            for c in row.findall('a:c', ns):
                t=c.attrib.get('t')
                v=c.find('a:v', ns)
                val=''
                if v is not None:
                    val=v.text or ''
                    if t=='s':
                        val=shared[int(val)]
                vals.append(val)
            print(vals)
PY"

with zipfile.ZipFile(path) as z:
    shared=[]
    if 'xl/sharedStrings.xml' in z.namelist():
        root=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/sharedStrings.xml'))
        for si in root.findall('a:si', ns):
            texts=[]
            for t in si.iterfind('.//a:t', ns):

import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
path=Path('desktop/fashion_ecommerce/product_data/top10_product_status_table.xlsx')
ns={'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main','r':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships','pr':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships'}
with zipfile.ZipFile(path) as z:
    shared=[]
    if 'xl/sharedStrings.xml' in z.namelist():
        root=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/sharedStrings.xml'))
        for si in root.findall('a:si', ns):
            texts=[]
            for t in si.iterfind('.//a:t', ns):
                texts.append(t.text or '')
            shared.append(''.join(texts))
    wb=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/workbook.xml'))
    rels=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/_rels/workbook.xml.rels'))
    rel_map={rel.attrib['Id']: rel.attrib['Target'] for rel in rels.findall('pr:Relationship', ns)}
    sheets=[]
    for sh in wb.find('a:sheets', ns):
        sheets.append((sh.attrib['name'], rel_map[sh.attrib['{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships}id']]))
    print('SHEETS', sheets)
    for name,target in sheets:
        xml=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/'+target))
        print('SHEET', name)
        rows=xml.find('a:sheetData', ns)
        for row in list(rows)[:8]:
            vals=[]
            for c in row.findall('a:c', ns):
                t=c.attrib.get('t')
                v=c.find('a:v', ns)
                val=''
                if v is not None:
                    val=v.text or ''
                    if t=='s':
                        val=shared[int(val)]
                vals.append(val)
            print(vals)

with zipfile.ZipFile(path) as z:

            shared.append(''.join(texts))
    wb=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/workbook.xml'))
    rels=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/_rels/workbook.xml.rels'))

    print('SHEETS', sheets)
    for name,target in sheets:
        xml=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/'+target))
        print('SHEET', name)
        rows=xml.find('a:sheetData', ns)
        for row in list(rows)[:8]:
            vals=[]
            for c in row.findall('a:c', ns):
                t=c.attrib.get('t')
                v=c.find('a:v', ns)
                val=''

                    val=v.text or ''
                    if t=='s':
                        val=shared[int(val)]
                vals.append(val)
            print(vals)

import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
path=Path('desktop/fashion_ecommerce/product_data/top10_product_status_table.xlsx')
ns={'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main','r':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships','pr':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships'}
with zipfile.ZipFile(path) as z:
    shared=[]
    if 'xl/sharedStrings.xml' in z.namelist():
        root=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/sharedStrings.xml'))
        for si in root.findall('a:si', ns):
            texts=[]
            for t in si.iterfind('.//a:t', ns):
                texts.append(t.text or '')
            shared.append(''.join(texts))
    wb=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/workbook.xml'))
    rels=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/_rels/workbook.xml.rels'))
    rel_map={rel.attrib['Id']: rel.attrib['Target'] for rel in rels.findall('pr:Relationship', ns)}
    sheets=[]
    for sh in wb.find('a:sheets', ns):
        sheets.append((sh.attrib['name'], rel_map[sh.attrib['{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships}id']]))
    print('SHEETS', sheets)
    for name,target in sheets:
        xml=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/'+target))

        for row in list(rows)[:8]:

import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
path=Path('desktop/fashion_ecommerce/product_data/top10_product_status_table.xlsx')
ns={'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main','r':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships','pr':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships'}
with zipfile.ZipFile(path) as z:
    shared=[]
    if 'xl/sharedStrings.xml' in z.namelist():
        root=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/sharedStrings.xml'))
        for si in root.findall('a:si', ns):
            texts=[]
            for t in si.iterfind('.//a:t', ns):
                texts.append(t.text or '')
            shared.append(''.join(texts))
    wb=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/workbook.xml'))
    rels=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/_rels/workbook.xml.rels'))
    rel_map={rel.attrib['Id']: rel.attrib['Target'] for rel in rels.findall('pr:Relationship', ns)}
    sheets=[]
    for sh in wb.find('a:sheets', ns):
        sheets.append((sh.attrib['name'], rel_map[sh.attrib['{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships}id']]))
    print('SHEETS', sheets)
    for name,target in sheets:
        xml=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/'+target))
        print('SHEET', name)
        rows=xml.find('a:sheetData', ns)
        for row in list(rows)[:8]:
            vals=[]
            for c in row.findall('a:c', ns):
                t=c.attrib.get('t')
                v=c.find('a:v', ns)
                val=''
                if v is not None:
                    val=v.text or ''
                    if t=='s':
                        val=shared[int(val)]
                vals.append(val)
            print(vals)
